Title: Ute Kuririn! Negai o kometa Genki-dama
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Hiromi Tsuru
Plot: Son Gohan fights Vegeta as Kuririnn prepares to throw the Genki Dama that he created from the last of Son Goku's energy. Also, Karin shows up at the Kame House, and he, Roshi, Bulma, and Chichi go to help.
